title: CIS Creative Intelligence System — Build v1
concept: Design, build, and document a local creative intelligence studio operating system that transforms raw source material into structured knowledge and finished creative work. The system itself is the first project — every architectural decision, pipeline command, knowledge record, and workflow discovery is source material for the system's own knowledge base.
intended_output_type: local web application + CLI pipeline + structured knowledge base
wias_notes: WEB is the primary active stage. WEB is the catchall domain for code-based application development. The dashboard, pipeline scripts, and operator interface are all WEB outputs. Other WIAS stages will become active as the system processes source material from those domains.

production_phases.label: Phase PD — Pre-Development Harness
production_phases.summary: Infrastructure proven. 5 drives mounted. SQLite memory layer. cis-start harness. Obsidian vault synced to GitHub.

production_phases.label: Phase 0 — Execution Layer
production_phases.summary: Full pipeline proven: intake → classify → preprocess → extract → normalize. First knowledge record produced from Weird War Tales cover. 12 ADRs locked.

production_phases.label: Phase 1 — Intelligence Extraction
production_phases.summary: cis_review.py built and tested. cis-log insight subcommand added. Runtime scripts committed to version control. Dashboard design under evaluation.

production_phases.label: Phase 2 — Operator Dashboard
production_phases.summary: Flask API backend + React frontend. Five panels: Intake, Pipeline, Review, Knowledge Base, Insights.

production_phases.label: Phase 3 — Knowledge Base + Retrieval
production_phases.summary: Vector index. Retrieval system. Knowledge browser.

production_phases.label: Phase 4 — Project Management Interface
production_phases.summary: Full project tracking. DAM integration. WIAS stage progression.

production_phases.label: Phase 5 — Agent Layer
production_phases.summary: Bounded agent roles. Librarian, Researcher, Producer, Guardrail.

source_material.note: The 10TB archive at /mnt/archive is the primary raw material pool for the system. Sources are ingested on demand via cis-intake.

runtime.vm: Ubuntu 24.04 in Proxmox VM 100 on node wander

inferred_constraints: Sequential build discipline must be maintained — no phase skipped
Dashboard framework must support final vision — React + Flask chosen to prevent rebuild
Version control must cover runtime scripts and knowledge records, not docs only
Human review is required at every knowledge record promotion step
risk_flags: Session insights being lost in chat — insight capture now active via cis-log
Runtime scripts were outside version control until 2026-04-17 — now resolved
DB schema must be checked before any new INSERT operation
ai_inference.effort_estimate: Multi-month build. Phase 1 active. Dashboard is next major deliverable.
